required_preferences.fact: Hosts onboarding coffee meetups for summer interns exclusively at the office café — avoids offsite gatherings due to firm policy and client proximity

supersedes.fact: Hosts onboarding coffee meetups for summer interns at her favorite café — never delegates mentorship duties

required_preferences.fact: Takes digital detox days once per month: no emails or work messages, prioritizes walks or museum visits around London parks and landmarks

required_preferences.fact: Develops detailed slide decks and interactive case studies for internal and client training sessions, preferring hands-on learning formats over lecture-based presentations
